Home.title: Find the best route for your trip
Home.subtitle: Compare paths, transport modes, prices, and travel times between cities all over Brazil

disclaimers.data: *We use public data and AI queries to estimate prices, itineraries, and times.
disclaimers.ai: *AI may suggest route segments that don't exist due to recent changes.
disclaimers.geolocation: *We use your geolocation only to suggest the current departure city.

errors.originSameAsDest: The origin city cannot be the same as the destination.
errors.destSameAsOrigin: The destination city cannot be the same as the origin.
errors.invalidOrigin: Invalid origin city. Please select an option from the list.
errors.invalidDest: Invalid destination city. Please select an option from the list.
errors.pastDate: The travel date cannot be before today.
errors.maxDate: The travel date cannot be more than 1 year from today.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Your privacy is a priority for us. This privacy policy transparently clarifies how <bold>Best Route</bold> handles your information.

geolocation.title: 1. Geolocation Usage
geolocation.content: Our application requests access to your device's geolocation exclusively to automatically fill in the origin city field in the search form. This feature is solely intended to optimize your browsing experience.

data.title: 2. Data Storage and Retention
data.content: <bold>We do not store</bold> your location data, IP address, or searched route histories in databases. The information entered in the form is processed in real time solely to calculate and display route options, being discarded immediately after the request.

cookies.title: 3. Cookies and Third-Party Tracking
cookies.content: This digital environment is free from third-party tracking tools, marketing cookies, or social media pixels. We only use local storage strictly necessary for the technical functioning of the application.

security.title: 4. Security
security.content: All data traffic between your browser and our services is encrypted using the HTTPS protocol, ensuring your queries travel securely.

messages.400: The city and/or state provided is not a valid field.
messages.422: It was not possible to generate a valid itinerary with the locations provided. Please check the city names and try again.
messages.504: The AI we use to calculate your route is under high demand right now. Please try again later.
messages.default: There was a problem processing your route. Please try again later.

SuccessPage.found: {count, plural, =1 {# option found} other {# options found}}
SuccessPage.disclaimer: Travel values, distances, and times are estimated by AI and may differ from real data from apps, websites, or official ticket counters.

Footer.description: Find the best route in seconds. Compare paths, prices, and times between any city in Brazil.

LoadingModal.title: We are calculating your route
LoadingModal.subtitle: Please wait a few moments. Do not refresh or close the page.
